mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.price_at_purchase, o.order_id AS order_orderId, o.user_id AS order_userId, o.status AS order_status, o.total_price AS order_totalPrice, o.created_at AS order_createdAt, p.product_id AS product_productId, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.stock AS product_stock, p.category AS product_category FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{orderItemId}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.price_at_purchase, o.order_id AS order_orderId, o.user_id AS order_userId, o.status AS order_status, o.total_price AS order_totalPrice, o.created_at AS order_createdAt, p.product_id AS product_productId, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.stock AS product_stock, p.category AS product_category FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, price_at_purchase) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{priceAtPurchase})
